description_long: This is a compact, single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, set on a green lawn base. The structure features a flat roof and a simple, modern design with large windows on the front and side facades, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The front of the bungalow displays two prominent glass windows and a main entrance, while the rear and sides are more enclosed, with fewer and smaller windows. The interior layout is visible from above, showing distinct rooms and open living spaces, with some furniture and fixtures discernible. The exterior walls are primarily white, contrasting with the green lawn and brown window frames. The overall appearance is clean, minimalistic, and functional, suitable for urban or suburban neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and a white exterior set on a green lawn. The design is minimalistic and functional, with visible interior rooms and a simple rectangular shape.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large glass windows, the main entrance, and a clear view of the interior layout.
description_view_1: Side view with a mostly solid white wall, minimal windows, and a glimpse of the interior rooms.
description_view_2: Rear view featuring a tiled patio area, smaller windows, and brown window frames.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a long white wall, limited window openings, and part of the patio visible.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and smaller side/rear windows
